title: Technology and media
explanation:
Technology and media

  • digital words: device, update, password, privacy, account
  • media words: headline, article, channel, broadcast, documentary
  • verbs: stream, upload, subscribe, scroll

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Remember to install the latest security ____. | *update | channel | documentary
I changed my social media ____ after the hack. | *password | headline | scroll
We watched a nature ____ last night. | *documentary | account | privacy
questions.feedback: A documentary is factual TV or film.

questions.text: She likes to ____ music instead of downloading it. | *stream | scroll | print

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: This newspaper ____ sounds surprising, but the article is more balanced. | headline
Please do not share your banking ____ with anyone. | details
I ____ to that science channel on YouTube. | subscribe
The company promised to improve user ____. | privacy
He spent an hour ____ through short videos. | scrolling

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The football match will be ____ live at 8 p.m. | *broadcast | uploaded | streamed off
questions.feedback: Broadcast means sent on TV or radio.

questions.text: I read an interesting ____ about climate change. | *article | device | network
questions.feedback: Article = written text in a paper or online.

questions.text: This ____ is too old to run the new app. | *device | headline | broadcast
questions.feedback: A phone or tablet is a device.

questions.text: Log out of your ____ when you use a public computer. | *account | scroll | documentary
